title: JobOS.ai — Managerial ↔ Agent Hierarchy Crosswalk Schema
description: Bidirectional mapping rules between Managerial Job Hierarchy nodes and Agent Job Hierarchy nodes. Enables translation between human-centric T-1/T-2/T-3 jobs and agent-centric fractal T-3 DSL constraints. Crosswalks are the basis for the Managerial-Agent Alignment Index (MAAI).

translation_example.description: Worked example showing how a managerial statement translates to one or more agent DSL statements.

agent_statements.description: One or more T-3 DSL constraint statements derived from the managerial job.

node_mapping.description: A single node-level crosswalk entry linking one managerial node to one or more agent nodes.

agent_node_ids.description: One or more agent nodes that implement or correspond to this managerial job.

translation_type.description: direct: 1:1 translation. decomposition: 1 managerial → N agent tasks. aggregation: N agent tasks → 1 managerial job. analog: conceptually similar but different measurement frame. no_equivalent: managerial job has no agent parallel (human-only).

confidence.description: Translation confidence score (1.0 = verified by domain expert).

automation_coverage.description: What fraction of this managerial job is covered by agent automation (0 = manual, 1 = fully automated).

translation_rules.description: Domain-agnostic rules for translating between managerial and agent hierarchies.

t1_to_agent_mission.const: A T-1 Strategic job becomes the Agent mission statement. The mission should preserve the 'WHY' but frame it as an automation objective with a measurable outcome delta (e.g., 'from X to Y' or 'by Z%').

t2_to_agent_tasks.const: A T-2 Core Functional job translates to one or more Pattern A or Pattern B T-3 DSL constraints. The ODI outcome statement becomes either a time minimization (if the imperfection is speed/latency) or a likelihood minimization (if the imperfection is risk/error/failure rate).

t3_human_to_agent.const: A T-3 Execution job for a HUMAN executor translates to a T-3 DSL constraint with the same verb-noun action. The start_state is 'task assigned' or 'trigger received', and the end_state is the completion criterion of the human step.

t3_already_dsl.const: A T-3 job for an AI/MIXED executor that already uses DSL format maps directly (1:1, translation_type=direct).

experience_dimension.const: Dimension A (FEEL) experience nodes have no direct agent equivalent. They map as translation_type=no_equivalent. However, experience outcomes CAN inform agent success_criteria (e.g., 'user sentiment score > 4.0' as a Pattern B constraint).

mappings.description: All node-level crosswalk entries for this scope.

worked_examples.description: Library of worked translation examples across domains. Used for LLM-based auto-translation and validation.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Achieve predictable revenue growth in the SMB segment
agent_statements: Automate lead qualification to reduce conversion cycle from 72h to < 4h for all inbound SMB leads
worked_examples.notes: T-1 WHY preserved; agent mission adds measurable delta (72h → 4h).

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Reduce the time it takes to convert a qualified lead to a closed deal
agent_statements: Minimize the time to complete a deal qualification from discovery call to CRM stage update, measured in hours, target ≤ 24
Minimize the likelihood of a qualified lead going uncontacted for > 1 business day, measured as miss_rate in percent, target ≤ 2
worked_examples.notes: One T-2 outcome decomposes into Pattern A (speed) + Pattern B (reliability) constraints.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Define qualification criteria and scoring rubric for inbound leads
agent_statements: Minimize the time to enrich a lead record from CRM creation to ICP score computed, measured in minutes, target ≤ 15
worked_examples.notes: Human step 'define criteria' becomes agent step 'compute ICP score automatically'.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: To Be recognized as the account's most trusted advisor
worked_examples.notes: Dimension A FEEL node — no agent analog. Inform success_criteria via sentiment proxy.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Reduce the time to resolve a P2 support ticket from assignment to resolution
agent_statements: Minimize the time to resolve a P2 support ticket from ticket assignment to resolution confirmed, measured in hours, target ≤ 8
worked_examples.notes: Direct 1:1 translation — T-2 outcome maps cleanly to Pattern A with identical measurement frame.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Minimize the likelihood of a data entry error in the procurement system
agent_statements: Minimize the likelihood of invoice processing error due to PO field mismatch, measured as error_rate in percent, target ≤ 0.1

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Ensure regulatory compliance for all cross-border transactions
agent_statements: Minimize the likelihood of a cross-border transaction processed without sanctions screening, measured as breach_rate in per_10000, target ≤ 1
worked_examples.notes: Compliance outcome reframed as Pattern B likelihood constraint.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Reduce the time to provision a new employee's software access
agent_statements: Minimize the time to provision all required software licenses from IT ticket creation to first login confirmed, measured in hours, target ≤ 4

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Maintain accurate inventory counts across all warehouse locations
agent_statements: Minimize the likelihood of inventory count discrepancy > 1% detected at cycle audit, measured as defect_rate in percent, target ≤ 0.5

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Increase the speed and accuracy of financial close reporting
agent_statements: Minimize the time to complete financial close reconciliation from period end to CFO sign-off, measured in business_days, target ≤ 3
Minimize the likelihood of a material reconciliation error detected post-close, measured as error_rate in per_1000, target ≤ 1
worked_examples.notes: Dual constraint: speed (Pattern A) + accuracy (Pattern B).

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Grow the organization's capability for machine learning model deployment
agent_statements: Automate ML model deployment pipeline to reduce time from model approval to production serving, measured in hours, target ≤ 2
worked_examples.notes: Strategic capability-building job → agent operational target for one key sub-capability.

worked_examples.managerial_statement: Protect customer data from unauthorized access
agent_statements: Minimize the likelihood of unauthorized data access event passing undetected for > 15 minutes, measured as miss_rate in percent, target ≤ 0.01
